items.caption: A stylized graphic with a blue and black halftone grungy background. in the foreground, there is a red heart with a silver outline, positioned to the right of a heart monitor graphic. the heart monitor graphic has a red background with a black line representing an electrocardiogram (ecg) rhythm. to the left of the heart monitor, there is a blue rectangle with a black border, which appears to be a screen or monitor. the overall style of the image is reminiscent of a digital advertisement or an icon for a medical device.
